tool.name: EnzyWizard Clean
tool.description: Clean a protein structure and generate multi-format files

param.name: input_path
param.label: Protein structure
param.help: Input protein structure file in CIF or PDB format.

tool.help: Clean a protein structure and generate multi-format files. The wrapper symlinks Galaxy file inputs into the job working directory and captures the tool-created output directory/files as a Galaxy discovered collection.
